    @allure.title("POST /api/v1/auth/verification/ - bo'sh body")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    def test_send_verification_empty_body(self):
        """
        Maqsad: Bo'sh body bilan xato qaytarishini tekshirish
        """
        with allure.step("Bo'sh body bilan so'rov yuborish"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/auth/verification/"
            response = requests.post(url, json={})
    
        with allure.step("Status code 400 ekanligini tekshirish"):
